details.description: The team store is only open on event days. For assistance with merchandise, please call the Delaware North Retail department.
details.name: Team Store

details.description: To access this restroom on an event day, please visit the usher stationed at this location for assistance.
details.name: Family Restroom

details.description: To access this suite on an event day, please visit the usher at section 144 for assistance.
details.name: Nursing Suite

details.description: This location varies in access on an event basis. For more information please call the MetLife Stadium Box Office. During New York Jets games, guests sitting in section 139 only will have access to the club and its amenities below. For New York Giants games, the club is accessible to the public at the beginning of the 2nd quarter.
details.name: MetLife 50 Club

details.description: West VIP provides access to the Miller Lite MVP Club, Commissioner's Club, The Green Room, Suites 3-50 through 3-80, 5-50 through 5-80, and 6-50 through 6-80.
details.name: West VIP Lobby

details.description: The Coaches Club opens the same time as the stadium gates for all events. Guests sitting in sections 111C through 115C have access to the club. *Please note only rows 15 and below in 111C and 115C have access for a New York Jets game.*
details.name: Coaches Club
